items.name_en: Premium 163c01 Dynamic Chip. This Speedy Bandoulière 25 handbag draws inspiration from the Express bag launched by the brand in 1930, featuring a delicate structure crafted from Monogram Empreinte leather, cleverly using a deep background to highlight the large Monogram embossed pattern. Dazzling metalware and bright linings highlight exquisite details, with a top handle and a detachable and adjustable strap. Model: M58947. Leather: Italian Grade A leather. Hardware: Imported Grade A all-steel hardware. Packaging: Full set of original MB packaging. Dimensions: 25.0 x 19.0 x 15.0 cm (L x H x W)

items.name_en: Premium 163c01 Dynamic Chip. This Speedy series is from the Louis Vuitton x Murakami Re-edition series, cleverly incorporating the bright tones of the Japanese artist into the Monogram coated canvas. Calfskin trim outlines the close-fitting structure, and the nameplate is embellished with an elegant bow detail. Model: M13085. Leather: Italian Grade A leather. Hardware: Imported Grade A all-steel hardware. Packaging: Full set of original MB packaging. Dimensions: 25.0 x 19.0 x 15.0 cm (L x H x W)

items.name_en: Premium Factory Leather N82068 Grape Purple with Python. Established in 1854, the Capucines handbag was named after the street in Paris where the first store opened and was introduced in 2013. Crafted from full-grain Taurillon leather, it features a signature flap: the exterior displays the Monogram flower, while the interior reveals leather-covered letters. Dimensions: 31.5 x 20 x 11 cm

items.name_en: Premium Factory Leather N82068 Grape Purple with Python. This Capucines BB handbag features a refined structure crafted from full-grain Taurillon leather. It is equipped with a top handle, double-flap, and a glossy python-embossed logo, making it a stunning choice for day or night. A detachable wide shoulder strap allows for shoulder or crossbody wear to show off a modern look. Size: 27 * 18 * 9 cm

items.name_en: Premium Original Leather M23955 M23947 Black Black Warrior (Gun Buckle)
items.name_cn:
Premium Original Leather M23955 M23947 Black Black Warrior (Gun Buckle)
Featuring exquisite cowhide leather and matte metal hardware to convey a modern attitude, this new horizontal design gathers classic elements from the same series. The KHl adjustable woven chain makes it convenient to carry on the shoulder or crossbody, making it a trendy choice for carrying essentials like a phone and a short wallet.
Dimensions: 27.0 x 18.0 x 9.0
